name: Knostic Security Shield
description: Security guardrail plugin — blocks destructive commands, redacts secrets and PII from agent output

mode.description: Enforcement mode: 'enforce' blocks and redacts, 'audit' only logs findings

layers.description: Enable or disable individual security layers

promptGuard.description: L1: Inject security policy into agent context

outputScanner.description: L2: Redact secrets/PII from tool output

toolBlocker.description: L3: Hard-block tool calls (requires host support)

securityGate.description: L5: Security gate tool for exec/read gating

sensitiveFilePaths.description: Additional file path patterns to block (regex strings)

destructiveCommands.description: Additional destructive command patterns to block (regex strings)
